_about: RFC 0002 — frozen paraphrase probe set. Each probe pairs a natural-language query with the accepted learning(s) it MEANS, where the query deliberately avoids the gold's tag/body vocabulary. Authored once from the live vault (2026-06-10), spot-checked by the maintainer, then frozen: the eval replays it deterministically. This is the semantic-headroom yardstick — lexical retrieval is expected to score low here BY DESIGN; the P2/P3 semantic upgrade is accepted or rejected on this number. Stale-gold rule: if a gold entry_id no longer exists, the eval flags the probe; re-author, do not silently drop.

probes.query: may a low-level module reach up and call code in the UI level above it
where should interface definitions live versus the concrete classes that fulfill them
why we collapsed the five-tier structure into three tiers plus a shell
why the app no longer uses one global shared object to wire up its services
which vendor's service powers both single-word lookups and whole-sentence rendering
why we abandoned the built-in on-device macOS language conversion framework
how the app grabs whatever text the user currently has highlighted in another program
who decides if the request is a word lookup or a sentence conversion, the app or the backend
where do we keep the third-party credential the backend functions need at runtime
what protects the public endpoint while there is no login system yet
how do we tell individual people apart in the metrics without any account system
why we postponed deciding prices until real day-to-day usage evidence exists
when something misbehaves, should I adjust settings around it or change the program itself
how we satisfied the app store requirement that people can erase their profile and stored records
running several coding agent sessions at the same time on separate checkouts to write specs
why we stopped trusting the json file that mapped features to their checks, and what replaced it
keeping people's original writing out of the cloud while still letting them ask questions over it
what working hours overlap between our colleagues across the three countries
the careful two-step manual procedure for loading my devotional journal entries
why build a personal toolkit from my own needs instead of adopting other people's automation wholesale
the recommended way to organize a window whose appearance switches among several visual modes
why the release number stayed the same even after running Apple's official bump utility
